Overview.title: What is
Overview.description: Critical is a revolutionary immersive cycling simulator. Through synchronized wind, light, sound, and fog effects, it transforms any indoor trainer into a track-grade riding experience. Whether for serious training, showroom demos, or content creation, Critical delivers immersion you've never felt before.
Overview.productImageHint: Replace with the real product image

Features.title: 8 Core Features
Features.subtitle: Multi-sensory synchronization for true track immersion
Features.castSubtitle: Stream phone audio over WiFi to the speaker
Features.fogSubtitle: One-touch atmospheric fog for total immersion

Specs.title: Hardware
Specs.subtitle: Pro-grade hardware engineered for the ultimate ride
Specs.ledValue: WS2812B × 13 (10 main + 3 tail), 4 zones independently controlled
Specs.encoderValue: EC11 rotary encoder (PCNT 4× decoding), single/double/triple/long press
Specs.storageValue: NVS + LittleFS, supports 3 custom logo slots

UseCases.title: Use
UseCases.subtitle: Multiple scenarios, unlimited possibilities
UseCases.trainingDesc: Pair with a smart trainer so wind speed reacts to your power output. Indoor sessions become genuine sprints with real resistance and speed feel.
UseCases.showroomDesc: Build immersive product demos for bike-brand showrooms and experience stores. Multi-sensory effects pull customers in.
UseCases.creatorDesc: Give cycling YouTubers and live streamers cinema-grade visuals. LED + fog + wind audio create film-quality footage.

AppShowcase.title: The dedicated
AppShowcase.subtitle: Bluetooth pairing, full real-time control. Your immersive ride at your fingertips.
AppShowcase.scanDesc: Bluetooth scan and one-tap pairing with Critical
AppShowcase.runningDesc: Real-time speed dial + throttle slider control
AppShowcase.colorizeDesc: 14 presets + RGB color wheel for custom palettes
AppShowcase.logoDesc: Upload from camera or gallery to the round LCD
AppShowcase.wifiAudioDesc: Stream phone audio in real time to the speaker
AppShowcase.versionInfo: Critical App v1.0.0 · Supports Android 8.0+ / iOS 14+
